title: Translucent Shield
description: Makes Minecraft shields translucent with a clean glass-like look while keeping the original texture style. Enhances visibility, reduces screen blocking, and gives shields a smooth modern transparent appearance.
body:
# Translucent Shields

Makes Minecraft shields translucent with a clean glass-like appearance while keeping the vanilla style intact.

## Features
- Transparent shield textures
- Better screen visibility during combat
- Vanilla-friendly design
- Smooth and clean aesthetic
- Lightweight texture pack

## Perfect For
- PvP
- Bedwars
- Crystal PvP
- General gameplay

Enjoy a cleaner and less obstructive shield experience.
